'''wanobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmidrosis|osmidrosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmidrosis|osmidrosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wanobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wænebeth|wænebeth]] || [[word:wænebej|wænebej]] || [[word:wænebesh|wænebesh]] || [[word:wænebe|wænebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanonoboth|wanonoboth]] || [[word:wanonoboj|wanonoboj]] || [[word:wanonobosh|wanonobosh]] || [[word:wanonobo|wanonobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanoboth|wanoboth]] || [[word:wanoboj|wanoboj]] || [[word:wanobosh|wanobosh]] || [[word:wanobo|wanobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanofbofth|wanofbofth]] || [[word:wanofbofj|wanofbofj]] || [[word:wanofbofsh|wanofbofsh]] || [[word:wanofbof|wanofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanobotho|wanobotho]] || [[word:wanobojo|wanobojo]] || [[word:wanobosho|wanobosho]] || [[word:wanoboko|wanoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanoboth|wanoboth]] || [[word:wanoboj|wanoboj]] || [[word:wanobosh|wanobosh]] || [[word:wanobo|wanobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanobothol|wanobothol]] || [[word:wanobojol|wanobojol]] || [[word:wanoboshol|wanoboshol]] || [[word:wanobokol|wanobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanoboothotho|wanoboothotho]] || [[word:wanoboojojo|wanoboojojo]] || [[word:wanobooshosho|wanobooshosho]] || [[word:wanobooko|wanobooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanobothon|wanobothon]] || [[word:wanobojon|wanobojon]] || [[word:wanoboshon|wanoboshon]] || [[word:wanobokon|wanobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanobothooro|wanobothooro]] || [[word:wanobojooro|wanobojooro]] || [[word:wanoboshooro|wanoboshooro]] || [[word:wanobokooro|wanobokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
